title: Active Travel Fund tranche 2: evaluation baseline
body: "The Department for Transport awarded funding to local authorities to produce walking and cycling facilities via the Active Travel Fund, with tranche 1 funding allocated in 2020 and tranche 2 funding allocated in 2021.  The report describes the approach that the evaluation will take and outlines the 4 themes:   cycle tracks low traffic neighbourhoods school streets process evaluation   It provides some preliminary analysis of baseline data and describes the steps to be taken between the baseline report and the final report.  Related content   Active Travel Fund tranche 2: stage 1 process evaluation Active Travel Fund tranche 2: stage 2 process evaluation Active Travel Fund tranche 2: government response and peer review  "
